task.title: Run a job and check status
task.shortdesc: Create a run for a job and poll the run status until completion.

ul.li: You have a job ID (for example, job_123).

step.cmd: Create a run for the job.
Copy the run_id from the response.
Poll the run resource to check status.

info.p: Continue polling until status is succeeded or failed.

step.cmd: If the run fails, review the error details.

info.p: Inspect error.code, error.message, and error.details, then decide whether to replay the run.

result.p: You can trigger runs and observe their progress.
